![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/aAfdIgBH-Mo/maxresdefault.jpg)
# [How To Enable Or Disable Pop-Up Windows In The Zen Web Browser | PC Tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aAfdIgBH-Mo)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [No Rest For The Wicked](https://www.youtube.com/@norestforthewicked9889)
**Uploaded at**: 2024-10-31
**Published at**: 
**Length**: 01:34
**Views**: 2126
**Likes**: 8
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
How To Enable Or Disable Pop-Up Windows In The Zen Web Browser | PC Tutorial

Learn how to enable or disable pop-up windows in the Zen Web Browser with this easy-to-follow tutorial! Whether you want to allow pop-ups for certain websites or block them for a smoother browsing experience, this guide will show you how to adjust the pop-up settings in Zen Browser. Be sure to like, subscribe, and share if this video helps you!

Simple Steps
1. Open the Zen Browser.
2. Click on the 3 line hamburger menu in the upper right corner and choose "Settings".
3. Select "Privacy & Security" from the left side pane.
4. Scroll down to where you see the "Permissions" section and uncheck "Block Pop-Up Windows".

Chapters
0:00 How To Turn On Or Off Pop-Up Windows In The Zen Browser
0:19 Open The Zen Browser
0:31 Click On The 3 Bar Hamburger Menu
0:41 Select Settings
0:51 Select Privacy And Security
1:01 Scroll Down And Check Or Uncheck "Block Pop-Up Windows"


Email me at: craigjohnson4770@gmail.com

Find me on Twitter at: https://twitter.com/CraigJohnson20

Visit my Reddit page at: https://www.reddit.com/r/techtalktutorials/

Reach me on Tumblr at: https://www.tumblr.com/blog/techtalktutorials

Follow Me On Facebook At https://www.facebook.com/No-Rest-For-The-Wicked-104557294721998

#zenbrowser #videotutorial #norestforthewicked
```

web.title: Picture-in-Picture
web.description: With Picture-in-Picture (PiP) in Zen, you can pop videos out of webpages into a clean, always-on-top floating window.
web.markdown:
[User Manual](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual)

# Picture-in-Picture

Watch videos in a separate window

With **Picture-in-Picture (PiP)** in **Zen**, you can pop videos out of webpages into a clean, always-on-top floating window. Whether you're working, browsing, or just casually scrolling, PiP keeps your video visible without disrupting your flow.

## [How to Use Picture-in-Picture](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#how-to-use-picture-in-picture)

**Stay in flow while watching.**

### [1\. On-Screen Video Toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#1-on-screen-video-toggle)

When you hover over a supported video, a **Zen PiP toggle** will appear.

Click it to launch the video in a floating window.

![PIP toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/open-toggle.46852b3f.png)

- Right-click the toggle to move it to the left or right side.
- The toggle is hidden when the video is in full-screen mode.

### [2\. Address Bar Icon](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#2-address-bar-icon)

On pages with a single video, Zen displays a PiP icon in the **address bar**.

![Toolbar Toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/toolbar-toggle.2e673c61.png)

- If there are multiple videos or none, the icon remains hidden.

### [3\. Right-Click Menu](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#3-right-click-menu)

You can also launch PiP by **right-clicking** on the video.

- Some platforms like YouTube use custom menus.

In that case, use `⇧` + `Right-Click` or **double right-click** to access Zen’s native menu.

![PIP context menu](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/pip-context-menu.237ad79f.png)

### [4\. **Auto-Play in Mini Player**](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#4-auto-play-in-mini-player)

When you switch tabs while a video is playing, Zen quietly tucks the video into a floating player at the bottom right.
Enable it by setting the property below in about:config to TRUE
`media.videocontrols.picture-in-picture.enable-when-switching-tabs.enabled`

### [5\. **Resize**](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#5-resize)

Hover over any corner of the mini player and drag to adjust its size—just how you like it.

## [Keyboard Shortcuts](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#keyboard-shortcuts)

| Action | Shortcut |
| --- | --- |
| Launch/Close PiP | `Ctrl` + `⇧` + `]` |
| Mute / Unmute | `Ctrl` + `↓` / `Ctrl` + `↑` |
| Volume Control | `↑` / `↓` |
| Seek 5s Back / Forward | `←` / `→` |
| Seek 10% Back / Forward | `Ctrl` + `←` / `Ctrl` + `→` |
| Jump to Start / End | `Home` / `End` |
| Pause / Play | `Space` |
| Fullscreen Toggle | `Double-click` or `F` |
| Close PiP Window | `Ctrl` + `W` |

## [How to Disable Picture-in-Picture](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#how-to-disable-picture-in-picture)

### [Option 1: From the Player](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#option-1-from-the-player)

- Hover over the Picture-in-Picture Player
- Click on the \[x\] button

![Close pip](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/close.69de9d75.png)

### [Option 2: From Zen Settings](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#option-2-from-zen-settings)

- Go to **Settings → General → Browsing**
- Uncheck **"Enable picture-in-picture video controls"**

You can always re-enable it later.

![Disable pip](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/disable.3fc0df56.png)

### [Option 3: From the Toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#option-3-from-the-toggle)

- Hover over a video and right-click the PiP toggle.

- Select **"Hide Picture-in-Picture Toggle"**.


### [Option 4: From Configuration Page](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#option-4-from-configuration-page)

If you’d like to disable Picture-in-Picture functionality entirely, you can do so via Zen’s advanced configuration page:

1. In the address bar, type `about:config` and press Enter.
2. Accept any warning that appears.
3. Search for the setting: `media.videocontrols.picture-in-picture.enabled`.
4. Set it to **false** to disable Picture-in-Picture across Zen.

You can always re-enable it by returning to this setting and switching it back to **true**.

Why You Might Not See the Toggle

- The video is shorter than 45 seconds or has no audio.
- It’s in full-screen mode.
- The site may restrict PiP, but Zen gives you the option to override this via **"Enable Anyway"** when available.

## [Subtitles & Captions](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#subtitles--captions)

Turn on captions **before** activating PiP to see them in the floating window.

Zen supports captions on major platforms including:

- YouTube
- Netflix
- Disney+
- Amazon Prime Video
- Funimation
- Dailymotion
- Khan Academy
- BBC
- Washington Post
- Nebula
- Tubi
- Hotstar
- SonyLIV
- Any site using **WebVTT** (e.g. Coursera, Twitter)

More platforms are being added.

## [Media Player](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip\#media-player)

**Audio, always within reach.**

![Media Player](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/media-player.6122354f.png)

- **Automatic Playback Controls**

When audio is playing in a background tab, Zen adds a subtle media controller to the bottom of your sidebar.

- **Simple Dismissal**

To hide the Media Player, just click the “X” on the controller. Zen will take the hint.

[Glance\\
\\
Preview websites on top of your current tab](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/glance) [Keyboard Shortcuts\\
\\
Enhance your Zen experience with customizable keybinds](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/shortcuts)

### On this page

[How to Use Picture-in-Picture](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#how-to-use-picture-in-picture) [1\. On-Screen Video Toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#1-on-screen-video-toggle) [2\. Address Bar Icon](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#2-address-bar-icon) [3\. Right-Click Menu](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#3-right-click-menu) [4\. **Auto-Play in Mini Player**](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#4-auto-play-in-mini-player) [5\. **Resize**](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#5-resize) [Keyboard Shortcuts](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#keyboard-shortcuts) [How to Disable Picture-in-Picture](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#how-to-disable-picture-in-picture) [Option 1: From the Player](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#option-1-from-the-player) [Option 2: From Zen Settings](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#option-2-from-zen-settings) [Option 3: From the Toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#option-3-from-the-toggle) [Option 4: From Configuration Page](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#option-4-from-configuration-page) [Subtitles & Captions](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#subtitles--captions) [Media Player](https://docs.zen-browser.app/user-manual/pip#media-player)

![PIP toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/open-toggle.46852b3f.png)

![Toolbar Toggle](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/toolbar-toggle.2e673c61.png)

![PIP context menu](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/pip-context-menu.237ad79f.png)

![Close pip](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/close.69de9d75.png)

![Disable pip](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/disable.3fc0df56.png)

![Media Player](https://docs.zen-browser.app/_next/static/media/media-player.6122354f.png)
